goal: Add a verified external CUDA training launcher that runs the operator-packet verifier before invoking the real-adapter CUDA training handoff.
head: a8cc46b
blocked_scope: Changing verifier acceptance policy or weakening release gates
Editing M6 review docs to GO
Creating or committing model weights, adapters, Docker images, endpoint transcripts, copied external evidence bundles, or GO release evidence
Claiming M6-RC or v0 release GO from current local artifacts
allowed_edit_paths_scope_note: This gate may add a verified external CUDA training launcher generator, focused tests, generated launcher JSON/Markdown/Shell, LLM context/working state, completion log, and PABCD only.
required_evidence: Generated launcher runs verify_external_cuda_operator_packet.py before real_adapter_cuda_training_handoff.sh.
Launcher refuses fake-backend environment and missing verifier/packet/handoff files.
Focused tests verify command order and no release/M6 GO claim.
Generated launcher artifacts do not contain model weights, adapters, Docker images, endpoint transcripts, copied evidence bundles, or release GO claims.
warnings: The current host still lacks real trained adapter no-fake Docker endpoint evidence.
This gate adds a guarded launcher only; it does not run CUDA training, accept evidence, or relax readiness.

phase_notes.plan: Add a wrapper launch artifact that verifies the operator packet before invoking the existing CUDA training handoff.
phase_notes.audit: Docs currently tell operators to run verifier and handoff as separate commands; a wrapper reduces skipped-verifier and wrong-checkout errors before training starts.
phase_notes.build: Create launcher generator, focused tests, generated JSON/Markdown/Shell launcher, docs/CONTEXT.md, docs/WORKING.md, completion log, and PABCD.
phase_notes.check: Run focused tests, py_compile, launcher generation, shell syntax check, JSON validation, search evidence, and diff checks.
phase_notes.done: After verification passes, stage, commit, and push this verified-launcher phase.

pabcd.approved_scope: Verified external CUDA training launcher generator, focused tests, generated launcher JSON/Markdown/Shell, LLM context/working state, completion log, and PABCD only.
pabcd.blocked_scope: No product behavior changes, no verifier acceptance weakening, no M6 GO doc edits, no adapter/model/Docker evidence commits, no release GO claim.
pabcd.phase_completion_git_policy: When verification/evidence commands finish, stage, commit, and push this phase.
